pyqgis_plugin.name: MapThemeToolbox
pyqgis_plugin.description: Map Theme toolbox: Modify, Repair, Present themes, Sync and Auto-Save
pyqgis_plugin.about: A combined toolbar for managing QGIS Map Themes: modify mutual layer visibility across themes, repair broken layer paths, present themes with a single click, sync with Excel/CSV/GeoPackage, and auto-save the project on a timer. Compatible with QGIS 3.22+ and QGIS 4.x.

pyqgis_plugin.name: MapThemeToolbox
pyqgis_plugin.description: Map Theme toolbox: Modify, Repair, Present themes, Sync and Auto-Save
pyqgis_plugin.about: A combined toolbar for managing QGIS Map Themes: modify mutual layer visibility across themes, repair broken layer paths, present themes with a single click, sync with Excel/CSV/GeoPackage, and auto-save the project on a timer. Compatible with QGIS 3.22+ and QGIS 4.x.

pyqgis_plugin.name: RORB QGIS
pyqgis_plugin.description: View RORB results: browse .out files, plot hydrographs, export critical events
pyqgis_plugin.about: v2.37: Fix AEP label for EY events (e.g. aep0p2EY now shows "0.2 EY" not "0% AEP"); correct EY sort order. v2.36: Fix hydrograph viewer crash — stale _ax2.clear() call after rainfall removal. v2.35: Results viewer opens as floating window by default (still dockable). v2.34: Remove rainfall from hydrograph viewer; fix rainfall axis label to right side on critical events plot. v2.33: Rainfall overlay off by default; shows rainfall from ticked TP (rep TP preferred); results viewer is now a dockable panel. v2.32: Fix AttributeError on _cmp_scenario_rows before Compare tab is built. v2.30: Persist scenarios across sessions; rename scenario; remove Compare tab; rainfall overlay on hydrograph viewer. v2.29: Rename plugin to RORB QGIS. v2.28: Hydrograph + hyetograph zero-padded at start/end; editable export name column in preview; rainfall read from .stm when .out has none.

pyqgis_plugin.name: RORB QGIS
pyqgis_plugin.description: View RORB results: browse .out files, plot hydrographs, export critical events
pyqgis_plugin.about: v2.37: Fix AEP label for EY events (e.g. aep0p2EY now shows "0.2 EY" not "0% AEP"); correct EY sort order. v2.36: Fix hydrograph viewer crash — stale _ax2.clear() call after rainfall removal. v2.35: Results viewer opens as floating window by default (still dockable). v2.34: Remove rainfall from hydrograph viewer; fix rainfall axis label to right side on critical events plot. v2.33: Rainfall overlay off by default; shows rainfall from ticked TP (rep TP preferred); results viewer is now a dockable panel. v2.32: Fix AttributeError on _cmp_scenario_rows before Compare tab is built. v2.30: Persist scenarios across sessions; rename scenario; remove Compare tab; rainfall overlay on hydrograph viewer. v2.29: Rename plugin to RORB QGIS. v2.28: Hydrograph + hyetograph zero-padded at start/end; editable export name column in preview; rainfall read from .stm when .out has none.
